list.title: ADM Governance Workspaces
list.subtitle: TOGAF ADM phase governance overlaid onto approved architecture engagements (SoAWs). Every phase carries evidence links, gate readiness, and an approval trail.
list.empty: No ADM workspaces yet. Create one from a SoAW or here.
workspace.confirmDelete: Delete ADM workspace "{{name}}"? All phases and artefact links will be removed.
timeline.title: Phase timeline
gate.body.mark_ready: Move "{{phase}}" into gate review. Any outstanding required artefacts must be linked, waived, or explicitly overridden with a reason.
gate.body.approve: Approve "{{phase}}". A short comment is optional but recommended for the audit trail.
gate.body.reopen: Reopen "{{phase}}" for further work. Approval history is preserved; the reason is required and audit-logged.
gate.body.skip: Mark "{{phase}}" as skipped for this engagement. The reason is required and audit-logged.
gate.outstandingArtefacts_one: {{count}} required artefact is not linked or waived.
gate.outstandingArtefacts_other: {{count}} required artefacts are not linked or waived.
gate.overrideToggle: Override the readiness check with a documented reason
gate.reasonHelper: Minimum {{min}} characters. Recorded in the audit trail.
gate.commentHelper: Optional. Shown on the approval history.
artefact.title: Title
artefact.refIdHelper: Paste the UUID of the target SoAW / ADR / diagram / card / etc.
artefact.markRequired: Mark as required for the gate
artefact.confirmUnlink: Unlink this artefact? The underlying entity is not deleted.
artefact.waiveReasonPlaceholder: Why is this requirement not applicable?
requirements.title: Requirements Management
requirements.subtitle: Continuous across every phase. Requirements captured on any phase surface here.
soawSection.emptyBody: Turn this SoAW into a governed architecture engagement with TOGAF ADM phases, gate reviews, and evidence tracking. Existing SoAWs work unchanged when no workspace exists.
soawSection.noPermission: You need adm.view permission to see this section.
create.title: Create ADM workspace
create.subtitle: Standard TOGAF ADM template — 9 sequential phases plus continuous Requirements Management.
create.name: Workspace name
create.soawPickerHelper: The SoAW this workspace will govern.
create.initiativePickerHelper: Add an Initiative if you're governing one directly, without or alongside a SoAW.
dashboard.title: My ADM actions
